hooks.command: jq -e 'if (.tool_input.file_path // "") | test("project\\.pbxproj$") then halt_error("project.pbxproj is generated by XcodeGen. Edit project.yml + run `xcodegen generate` instead.") else . end' >/dev/null
jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""' | grep -qE '/project\.yml$' && (cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" && xcodegen generate >/dev/null 2>&1 && echo 'xcodegen: project regenerated' >&2) || true

command -v swiftlint >/dev/null 2>&1 && FILE=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""') && echo "$FILE" | grep -qE '\.swift$' && (cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" && swiftlint lint --quiet "$FILE" 2>&1 | head -40 >&2) || true
